warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"98f2m","text":"Do not drive/bike home for at least 2 hours.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Slice limes in half and squeeze out the juice
Combine in 4 liter receptacle: 1 part lime juice 1 part triple sec 1.5 parts tequila If your tequila is high quality you may want to use a higher proportion; up to 2 parts.
Salt glass rims by turning upside down and placing on a plate of lime juice, then on a plate of salt. Omit salt for persons with high blood pressure or excessive age.
creator: Lenny Teytelman
